About the Event

Your Creative Universe

Creativerse is an annual outdoor hangout for creatives — a space to chill, connect, and have fun. No stiff panels. No boring keynotes. Just good vibes, real people, and meaningful connections. Starting in Ondo State — with the world next.

🎯

Mission

Build an accessible ecosystem where creatives everywhere can connect, collaborate, and showcase their work in an inspiring space.

🌍

Vision

A yearly gathering that grows city by city — turning Creativerse into Africa's go-to annual celebration of creative culture.

🤝

Community First

Collaboration over competition. Accessibility for all. Creativity without borders. These values drive every decision we make.

📍

Starting in Ondo

Our inaugural edition launches in Ondo State — a beautiful open-air venue designed for creatives to unwind, breathe, and connect.

Who It's For

Are you a creative?

If you make things — with your hands, your camera, your voice, or your mind — you belong here.

🎨

Designers & Artists

Graphic designers, illustrators, animators

📸

Photographers & Filmmakers

Photographers, videographers, editors

🎵

Music & Audio

Producers, musicians, sound engineers

👗

Fashion Creatives

Designers, stylists, wardrobe artists

📱

Content Creators

Social media, vloggers, storytellers

🎤

Poets & Performers

Spoken word, performing artists, writers

The Experience

What Happens On the Day

Curated DJ sets and live musical performances. The energy runs from midday to night across the outdoor venue.

Structured icebreakers followed by open networking. Meet 250–300 fellow creatives and spark collaborations that last beyond the event.

Interactive game zones and tournaments all day — a fun, low-pressure way to bond with people you've never met.

Dedicated portrait and content setup on-site. Leave with fresh photos, new connections, and unforgettable memories.

Select food and drink vendors on-site. Free entry, outdoor setting, great food — the perfect combination.

Registration

Secure Your Spot

Entry is completely free. Register below and we'll keep you updated with all event details.

🎉

You're In!

Welcome to the Creativerse family. We'll reach out soon. Get ready to chill, connect, and create!

🔒 Your info is safe with us. No spam, ever.

Chill. Connect. Create.
